evidence.result: prepare, check, and status implement deterministic bindings, artifact/authority staleness, immutable content-addressed promotion, current-report selection, separate assurance axes, and exit codes 0/1/2; invalid or stale candidates reach no canonical write, while valid action-required reports are promoted
the three additive runners preserve engine exit codes and return stable exit-2 failure objects

Phase 2 integration is limited to one import, six JSON command/alias entries, three help lines, and three dispatch branches; generic JSON emission remains a single document and legacy dispatch behavior is unchanged
all four locales expose the three canonical review command signatures with --json
scoped scenarios cover idempotent prepare, current/stale status, promotion and non-promotion, action states, empty non-gating status, aliases, one-document JSON, and process exit codes
implementation conforms to the approved Phase 2 requirements, design, and done criteria
invalid root returned one parseable JSON document with reason project_root_missing
